tape: Equities firm -- S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17% on cool June PPI (-0.3% headline, core +0.2%) + ASML's AI-capex signal; VIX ~16.36 (-0.85%). Live tail stays energy/geopolitics: oil bid as Trump vows to intensify strikes on Iran, so research's oil-risk leg holds while quant_regime reads equities calm_drift -- I concur, tape is calm on equities, geopolitics is the isolated tail.

alerts.headline: Broad tape firm and calm (S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, VIX 16.36 -0.85%) on soft June PPI + ASML AI-capex. Only live risk is oil/geopolitics -- Trump pledging intensified Iran strikes keeps WTI bid. quant_regime calm_drift on equities agrees with my read; energy is the isolated tail, not a broad risk-off.

HELD -- phantom-sell vector now RESOLVED: risk.json fix a5484b6 (13:44Z) layers live last_price + staleness gates so the stale cache (1.555 vs broker ~2.13) no longer drives the $2.03 stop; downgraded from last run's warn to data-hygiene only. No fresh company news beyond the 7/15 Wraptor MX prototype PR (incremental, not a contract). Do-not-ADD ($200M baby-shelf capacity). No boost.

TOP-3 CANDIDATE (6.17, below 6.25 line) -- no NEW July offering, but ~30% dilution stands ($50M registered direct 27.6M sh @ $1.81 + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26). Stock ~$1.70 BELOW the $1.81 offer; CEO 7/7 buy came AFTER the raise. Concur risk.json -- do not buy as insider breakout.
TOP-3 CANDIDATE (6.1, below line) -- textbook pump-and-dump: HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.59, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto. Concur risk.json.

TOP-3 CANDIDATE (5.17, below line) -- +4.0 insider score is offering-backer accumulation, NOT management conviction; stock ~$9.06 still BELOW the $11.52 May $300M-offering price. Dilution overhang; do not buy as fresh breakout.

HELD/best gainer ~$14.20 -- no fresh catalyst; the +13% ICONIQ/director-buy move (7/10-7/13 buys, disclosed 7/15) is already priced. Post-lockup distribution overhang persists (Form 144 1.75M sh 7/8 + Lightspeed sales). Cache-desync stop risk now gated by fix a5484b6. FinBERT +0.158. No boost.

HELD ~$13.58 -- no fresh company item; energy leg gets a mild bid on the oil tape. Bhappu $968k (7/7) + Hansen buys already scored, but risk.json net-NEGATIVE by size (Chalmers Form 144 ~800k sh > ~$1M buys), Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. $300M ATM confirmed UNDRAWN. No boost.

HELD, clean ~$17 -- no fresh 7/15 item. Carried: Caris Detect launch (7/1), director $990k buy (7/13), $100M buyback, no shelf/ATM; Evercore Buy $25, Goldman Buy $27 above price. FinBERT +0.144. No boost.

HELD, low risk ~$5.22 -- Q1 FY27 (7/7) $107.9M rev / $0.15 non-GAAP / $26.9M adj EBITDA; director Englander bought 76,190 sh @ $5.22 (7/13). Anti-dilutive $140M self-tender, no shelf/ATM. Stop $5.00. No boost.

WATCHLIST ~$6.43 -- DLA bridge mod extended the refrigerant contract to 11/29/26 (options to 5/29/27); supply continues. Q1 beat on revenue ($60.15M, +8.7%), next-Q guide $74.5M above est. Constructive but already known; no fresh boost.
